name: pallasite-desktop
description: Electron / AppImage wrapper for Pallasite — bundles the built game + the controller-ws broker; the Lightning faucet stays remote.
author: TheCryptoDonkey

scripts.start:public: cross-env PALLASITE_VARIANT=public node scripts/prepare.mjs && cross-env PALLASITE_VARIANT=public electron .
scripts.dist:public: npm run prepare:public && electron-builder --config electron-builder.public.yml --publish never
scripts.release:public: npm run prepare:public && electron-builder --config electron-builder.public.yml --publish always
